name: WhisperKit
author: DavyWhisper
description: Local speech-to-text powered by WhisperKit. 7 model sizes, 99 languages, streaming support.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 本地语音转文字，由 WhisperKit 强力驱动。7 种模型规格，99 种语言，支持流式识别。
descriptions.de: Lokale Spracherkennung mit WhisperKit. 7 Modellgroessen, 99 Sprachen, Streaming-Unterstuetzung.
